tool_args.label: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics - October 2024

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Major Switch Replacement at 59th St – Columbus Circle

payload.description: Major switch replacement work at 59th St – Columbus Circle to allow trains to move between express and local tracks and 8 Av and 6 Av lines

tool_args.label: Workplace violence down nearly 30% year-over-year

payload.claim_text: Acts of workplace violence are down nearly 30% compared to this time last year and they are down more than 65% from the COVID-era highs.

tool_args.label: Crime down 6% from 2023 in October

payload.claim_text: For the month of October, we are excited to see that crime is down a total of 6% from 2023. The 28-day trend shows crime has come down 26% from the same time last year.

tool_args.label: Major felony crime decreased in September 2024

payload.claim_text: In September 2024, Major Felony Crime decreased by 8% month over month and by 5% versus September 2023. Crime also decreased by 11% when compared to the 2023 monthly average.

tool_args.label: Subway fires decreased over 28% on rolling 12-month basis

payload.claim_text: For the rolling 12-month basis, Subway Fires decreased by over 28% when comparing periods ending September 2024 and September 2023.

tool_args.label: Paratransit trip volume up nearly 30% year-over-year

payload.claim_text: Total trip volume in September 2024 increased by nearly 30% compared to September 2023, with a record high of 802,000 completed trips.

tool_args.label: Weekend OTP record 86.2% in September 2024
Subway Service Delivered 94.7% in September 2024
Subway Customer Journey Time Performance 84.3% in September 2024

payload.description: Percentage of customers arriving at destinations within five minutes of schedule
